image.title: NAS Leonard, W Strasser, JS Whittle, LI Volakis, RJ DeBellis, R Prichard, CW Atwood, GC Dungan

item.title: Reducing aerosol dispersion by High Flow Therapy in COVID-19: High Resolution Computational Fluid Dynamics Simulations of Particle Behavior during High Velocity Nasal Insufflation with a Simple Surgical Mask.
